accountHolder.description: Contains information about the account holder associated with the `balanceAccount`.

amount.description: Contains information about the amount of the transaction.

balanceAccount.description: Contains information about the balance account involved in the transaction.

balancePlatform.description: The unique identifier of the balance platform.

bookingDate.description: The date the transaction was booked into the balance account.

creationDate.description: The date and time when the event was triggered, in ISO 8601 extended format. For example, **2020-12-18T10:15:30+01:00**.

id.description: The unique identifier of the transaction.

status.description:
The status of the transaction.

 Possible values:

* **pending**: The transaction is still pending.

* **booked**: The transaction has been booked to the balance account.

transfer.description: Contains information about the transfer related to the transaction.

valueDate.description: The date the transfer amount becomes available in the balance account.
